name: Low-Income Exclusion from Private Debt Collection

eligibility.description: Individuals with AGI not exceeding 200% of the poverty level for the most recent taxable year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Prohibits the IRS from assigning tax debt to private collection agencies if the taxpayer's adjusted gross income is at or below 200% of the applicable poverty level.
